assertions.title: Intraday series render with shared time axis (8 PM – 8 AM)

steps.action: Open Night dashboard for current day and inspect metric strips/hypnogram alignment
steps.expected: Glucose and heart-rate strips plus sleep hypnogram share one 8 PM–8 AM axis
steps.observed: Only a single Heart Rate strip is visible; glucose strip is absent and hypnogram panel shows "No sleep stage data available". Required shared multi-panel alignment is not present.

assertions.issues: Expected glucose + HR + hypnogram aligned on shared axis, but glucose and hypnogram visualization were not rendered.

assertions.title: Sleep hypnogram renders with stage differentiation

steps.action: Inspect Night view sleep panel for stage bars and legend
steps.expected: Hypnogram shows distinct awake/light/deep/REM bars with legend and axis alignment
steps.observed: Panel displays "No sleep stage data available" and no stage legend/color-coded bars are rendered.

assertions.issues: Hypnogram stage differentiation/legend did not render on tested surface.

assertions.title: Summary strip with polarity-colored delta badges

steps.action: Review SummaryStrip metrics and delta badges on Night view
steps.expected: Sleep Score, Deep Sleep, Sleep Latency, HRV, RHR each show polarity-aware colored deltas and matching arrows
steps.observed: Summary strip shows only 4 metrics (Sleep Score, Deep Sleep, HRV, Resting Heart Rate); Sleep Latency metric is missing, so required full strip contract is not met.

assertions.issues: Required Sleep Latency delta badge is missing from SummaryStrip.

assertions.title: S1 scenario — meal → glucose spike → HR → sleep disruption causal chain

steps.action: Validate S1-specific chain on Night view (meal marker, glucose spike, HR response, hypnogram latency, insight text, exact red deltas)
steps.expected: All S1 causal elements and specified values are simultaneously visible and traceable
steps.observed: Screen lacks glucose panel and hypnogram stage rendering; observed summary values do not match S1 targets (e.g., no Sleep Latency ▲23 min badge), so the required S1 chain is not present.

assertions.issues: Current local night surface does not match S1 fixture expectations.

assertions.title: Night view window spans yesterday 8 PM to today 8 AM correctly

steps.expected: API returns 2026-03-27 20:00 to 2026-03-28 08:00 range and timestamps within bounds
steps.observed: API returned time_range.start=2026-03-27T20:00:00.000Z and end=2026-03-28T08:00:00.000Z with no out-of-window points in payload.

steps.action: Open /dashboard?date=2026-03-28 and inspect night axis labels
steps.expected: Frontend shows 8 PM–8 AM labels on the time axis
steps.observed: Frontend screen for that date does not show the required 8 PM/8 AM axis labels (intraday axis labels not visible).

assertions.issues: API window is correct, but required frontend time-axis label rendering was not observed.

assertions.title: Night view for in-progress night handles incomplete data

steps.action: Check runtime clock and request today's night view
steps.expected: When current time is during the night window (example 2 AM), series should end near now and UI should avoid misleading flatline to 8 AM
steps.observed: At test runtime local time was 05:36 EDT / 09:36 UTC; API for date=2026-04-05 returned completed window ending 08:00Z (not an in-progress night scenario).

assertions.issues: Blocked by unmet precondition: test runtime was outside an in-progress night window for the configured timezone/data.

frictions.description: Opening /dashboard initially landed on /sign-in in isolated browser session.
frictions.resolution: Generated mock owner session token for user_test_001 and set __session cookie in the assigned browser session.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned no tracked requests during this run.
frictions.resolution: Captured endpoint status/body evidence with curl artifacts in the mission evidence directory.

blockers.description: Could not reproduce an in-progress night (e.g., 2 AM within active 8 PM–8 AM window) at execution time to validate truncation behavior directly.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried current clock and fetched today's night payload; response represented a completed window ending at 08:00Z.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 failed (VAL-UINGT-001/002/003/004 and VAL-CROSS-019) and 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-020 due to unmet in-progress-night runtime precondition).
